revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:工学院大学出身の人物]] [[commons:Category:Alumni of Kogakuin University]] [[zh:Category:工學院大學校友]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Kōzō Nihonmatsu]].

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work

Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"

Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"

Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
